𝗦𝗘𝗘𝗪𝗔𝗩 | Creating animated video visualizations of audio waveforms for content creators, musicians, or anyone wanting to visually represent sound.  🌟 Rising Fast!

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Creating animated video visualizations of audio waveforms for content creators, musicians, or anyone wanting to visually represent sound.
📅 Created: Jun 2020 • Updated: Mar 2026

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Generates MP4 animations from audio files
✅ Customizable video framerate
✅ Support for stereo audio visualization
✅ Adjustable bar colors and background color
✅ Configurable number of bars, oversampling, and time display
✅ Control over animation speed, width, and height
✅ Seek and duration options for specific parts of the audio


⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 313 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 42 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 4 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Seewav is a Python tool that generates animated videos from audio files by visualizing their waveforms. It allows users to customize various aspects of the animation, such as colors, resolution, and playback speed, to create engaging visual representations of sound.

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/adefossez/seewav

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

𝗖𝗥𝗬𝗣𝗧𝗚𝗘𝗢𝗡 | Securely sharing sensitive text notes or files that automatically disappear after being viewed or after a set time, without the server having access to the content.  🌟 Rising Fast!

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 Svelte 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Securely sharing sensitive text notes or files that automatically disappear after being viewed or after a set time, without the server having access to the content.
📅 Created: May 2021 • Updated: Mar 2026

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Send text or files
✅ Client-side encryption (server cannot decrypt)
✅ View or time constraints (self-destructing)
✅ In-memory storage (no persistence)
✅ Obligatory dark mode support
✅ Web service, CLI client, and Raycast extension


⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.4K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 138 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 18 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Cryptgeon is an open-source, secure note and file sharing service inspired by PrivNote. It offers client-side encryption, ensuring the server cannot access the content, and supports self-destructing notes with view or time limits. It includes a web interface, a CLI client, and a Raycast extension.

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/cupcakearmy/cryptgeon

𝗦𝗣𝗔𝗥𝗞𝗟𝗘 | Debloating and optimizing a Windows PC through a user-friendly application interface.  🔥 Super Hot!

📅 Created: Dec 2023 • Updated: Mar 2026

✅ Apply Tweaks to Optimize your system
✅ Manage All Temp files in one place
✅ Install apps with the built-in Winget integration
✅ Backup and Revert changes
✅ View Basic System info


❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Sparkle is a Windows application built with React and Electron, designed to debloat and optimize your PC. It offers features for applying system tweaks, managing temporary files, integrating with Winget for app installations, and backing up/reverting changes.

❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

𝗧𝗢𝗥𝗥𝗥𝗔 | Searching and downloading torrents directly from the command line with a user-friendly TUI.  🔥 Super Hot!

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Searching and downloading torrents directly from the command line with a user-friendly TUI.
📅 Created: Jul 2025 • Updated: Mar 2026

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Search and download torrents from the CLI
✅ Textual-based TUI for an interactive experience
✅ Integration with Jackett and Prowlarr
✅ Pause/resume download support
✅ Customizable themes
✅ Native support for Linux, macOS, and Windows


╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.1K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 67 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 2 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Torrra is a Python-based command-line tool that provides a text-based user interface (TUI) for searching and downloading torrents. It integrates with indexers like Jackett and Prowlarr, leverages libtorrent for downloads, and is built using the Textual framework for a rich terminal experience.

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

𝗚𝗔𝗠𝗘𝗪𝗜𝗞𝗜 | To provide gamers with an unobtrusive, AI-driven overlay for quick access to game information, guides, and answers without interrupting gameplay.  🔥 Super Hot!

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide gamers with an unobtrusive, AI-driven overlay for quick access to game information, guides, and answers without interrupting gameplay.
📅 Created: Jul 2025 • Updated: Mar 2026

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ One Hotkey for instant overlay access (Ctrl+Q)
✅ AI Game Expert powered by Google Gemini with local knowledge bases
✅ Real-time wiki overlay
✅ Supports over 100 games for wiki access
✅ AI-enhanced knowledge bases for specific games (HELLDIVERS 2, Elden Ring, Don't Starve Together, Civilization VI)
✅ Web browser functionality within the overlay
✅ Customizable hotkeys and settings

🔍 1 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

GameWiki is an AI-powered in-game overlay tool for gamers, providing instant access to wiki information and smart Q&A services powered by Google Gemini's RAG capabilities. It allows users to get answers and guides without leaving their game, enhancing the gaming experience.
